name: Sweet Potato Apple
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the sweet potatoes and cut them into 1-inch cubes.
2. Place the sweet potato cubes and 2 tablespoons of water in a 2-quart casserole dish.
3. Cover with the casserole lid or a large plate.
4. Cook on HIGH (100% power) for 4 minutes, stirring after 2 minutes.
5. Peel and core the apples, then cut into 1-inch pieces.
6. Add the apple pieces to the sweet potatoes in the casserole, along with brown sugar, butter or margarine, salt, cinnamon, and nutmeg. Stir gently to combine.
7. Cover and cook on HIGH for 10 to 12 minutes until the sweet potatoes and apples are fork-tender. Gently stir with a rubber spatula after 6 minutes.
8. In a cup, mix the cornstarch with 1 teaspoon of water until smooth.
9. Stir the cornstarch mixture into the casserole liquid.
10. Cover and cook on HIGH for an additional minute or until the liquid thickens slightly.
220 calories per serving.
